title: MM-DeepResearch: A Simple and Effective Multimodal Agentic Search Baseline

defines.name: MM-DeepResearch
defines.definition: A multimodal deep research agent that combines explicit reasoning, multi-tool search, and cross-modal information synthesis for complex open-world tasks.

defines.name: Hyper-Search
defines.definition: A hypergraph-based QA generation method that constructs search-intensive multimodal question-answer pairs by modeling and connecting visual and textual nodes across modalities.

defines.name: DR-TTS
defines.definition: A decompose-recompose tool tree search method that trains specialized search tool experts and recomposes them to explore and synthesize valid multi-tool search trajectories.

problem: Existing multimodal agents lack sufficient search-intensive data, effective multi-tool search trajectories, and affordable training without costly online search APIs.
